meta.title: Gord Group Feed — Premium Russian Agriculture, Delivered to the World
meta.description: Gord Group Feed is the import and export arm of Gord Group, exporting premium Russian grains, oilseeds, animal feed, and food products to markets across the globe.

hero.headline: Premium Russian Agriculture, Delivered to the World
hero.subtext: Grains, oilseeds, animal feed, and food products — sourced from Russia's heartland and shipped to markets across the globe.
hero.videoFallback: Aerial footage of golden grain fields and cargo shipping operations.

about.heading: Connecting global buyers with Russia's harvest
about.body: Gord Group Feed is the import and export arm of Gord Group, connecting international buyers with Russia's vast agricultural output. Russia is the world's largest wheat exporter and a leading supplier of barley, corn, sunflower oil, and compound animal feed. We manage the entire supply chain — procurement, quality inspection, customs clearance, shipping, and final delivery — so our partners receive reliable volumes, on time, with full documentation.

products.heading: A complete agricultural portfolio
products.intro: From bulk grains to specialized animal feed, we supply consistent, inspected, and fully documented commodities at export scale.
products.captionDefault: Export-grade quality · Bulk & containerized shipping available

markets.heading: A global distribution network
markets.intro: We supply buyers across the Middle East, North Africa, Sub-Saharan Africa, Asia, and the CIS countries.

middleEast.name: Middle East
middleEast.countries: Saudi Arabia, UAE, Kuwait, Qatar, Oman, Yemen

how.heading: From inquiry to delivery
how.intro: A clear, documented process that gives buyers full visibility at every stage.

steps.1: You share your product and quantity requirements
steps.2: We provide pricing, availability, and shipping timeline
steps.4: We procure, inspect, and prepare the shipment in Russia
steps.5: We handle customs, freight, and documentation
steps.6: Goods arrive at your designated port

quote.heading: Request pricing and availability
quote.intro: Tell us what you need and our trade desk will prepare a tailored offer.
